theme: rebuild a shuffling machine from its behavior alone
title: Conjugated Shuffle: Minimal-Weight Reversible Resynthesis
strategies: canonical structure-blind cycle-fixup with a fixed full-bit-width transposition gadget (trivial)
cycle decomposition + best-star-center shortest-Hamming-path transpositions, plus a cheap single-axis invariance check (greedy)
global linear-subspace search recovering the conjugating change of basis, then CNOT-only basis change + tiny local resynthesis (strong)
true minimum-weight reversible circuit search (open ceiling, uncovered)
